backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a workshop POS system defining types (Price, InventoryItem, Transaction, ShopSettings) and persistent state with CRUD operations for inventory, transactions, settings, and reporting.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the fix for broken Inventory page add-dialog and Excel import functionality to specific files and components with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's role and notable fixes in the current version.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Kasir Bengkel' that mounts the React app via a root div and a module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (Cashier, Inventory, Transactions, Reports, Settings), a dark ThemeProvider, and a Toaster notification.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Print-friendly receipt component displaying transaction header, shop info/logo, item list with quantities and prices, subtotal, optional discount, and total — all in Indonesian.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Dark sidebar navigation component with five Indonesian-labeled links (Kasir, Inventori, Transaksi, Laporan, Pengaturan) and active-state highlighting using brand color.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via TanStack Query, using the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to handle login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on inventory items and transactions, including fetching, adding, deleting, replacing, and updating quantities via a backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for theming, and includes print styles for 80mm receipt printing.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, Indonesian Rupiah formatting, date/time formatting, and date-to-nanoseconds conversion helpers.
frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts: Self-contained XLSX file writer and reader using browser-native CompressionStream/DecompressionStream, implementing ZIP packaging, CRC-32, and raw DEFLATE compression without external dependencies.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx: Cashier POS page component that manages a shopping cart with pinned/searchable inventory items, handles transaction creation, and displays a printable receipt on completion.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: React page for managing inventory items with add, edit, delete, search, and Excel import/export functionality using mutation hooks and form validation.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: React page displaying business reports in tabs: daily, monthly, top-selling items, and profit/loss, with date filtering and data fetched via custom hooks.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: React page for managing shop settings (name, address, phone, thank-you message) and uploading a logo with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: React page listing past transactions with search and date filters, plus dialogs for viewing details, printing receipts, and deleting transactions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (oklch-based), fonts, shadows, border radii, and animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, known issues (broken add/upload on InventoryPage in v10), and a fix request to restore inventory add and Excel import functionality.
